body:
blxxxp:

“Hey, uh, is it cool if I just get changed here?”

“Y-yeah, sure, that’s fine.”

“Alright, you’re allowed to stare by the way.”

“W-wha-wha? S-stare?”

“Yeah, look all you want, I’d be flattered if a pretty girl like you perved on me while I got undressed.”

“P-p-p-p-p-”

She smiles and pulls off her shirt. “Is that p-p-p-pretty or p-p-p-perv?”

“I d-don’t know.”

She stands up from the couch and begins to pull off her pants. “Speak up hon, I can’t tell what you’re saying.”
